narration: Did you know lightning creates nitrogen?
visual_description: Hook visual: Did you know lightning creates nitrogen?
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Did you know lightning creates nitrogen?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Did you know lightning creates nitrogen?

narration: When lightning strikes, it generates extreme heat, breaking nitrogen molecules apart.
visual_description: Context visual: When lightning strikes, it generates extreme heat, breaking nitrogen molecules apart.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: When lightning strikes, it generates extreme heat, breaking nitrogen molecules apart.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: When lightning strikes, it generates extreme heat, breaking nitrogen molecules apart.

narration: This process forms nitrogen oxides, which then mix with rainwater.
visual_description: Escalation visual: This process forms nitrogen oxides, which then mix with rainwater.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: This process forms nitrogen oxides, which then mix with rainwater.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: This process forms nitrogen oxides, which then mix with rainwater.

narration: Plants absorb this nitrogen, essential for growth. So, lightning helps feed the Earth!
visual_description: Evidence visual: Plants absorb this nitrogen, essential for growth. So, lightning helps feed the Earth!
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Plants absorb this nitrogen, essential for growth. So, lightning helps feed the Earth!
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Plants absorb this nitrogen, essential for growth. So, lightning helps feed the Earth!

narration: Yet, climate change is affecting lightning frequency. Less lightning could mean less nitrogen for crops.
visual_description: Payoff visual: Yet, climate change is affecting lightning frequency. Less lightning could mean less nitrogen for crops.
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: Yet, climate change is affecting lightning frequency. Less lightning could mean less nitrogen for crops.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Payoff visual: Yet, climate change is affecting lightning frequency. Less lightning could mean less nitrogen for crops.
